content:
type: INTENT
files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
summary: Adding compress/cull_limit/eviction_policy params appended at END of Cache.__init__ and configure_cache() signatures (after memory_max_entries), plus set_compression() method and magic-header (b'DSPC') encode/decode in put/get. Will keep TTL params untouched if you add them - suggest you also append yours at the end so we don't collide on positional args; I'll rebase around your ttl param if it lands first.

fields.summary: Adding compress/cull_limit/eviction_policy params appended at END of Cache.__init__ and configure_cache() signatures (after memory_max_entries), plus set_compression() method and magic-header (b'DSPC') encode/decode in put/get. content:
type: STATUS
files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
summary: Compression + eviction knobs done: Cache(compress=, cull_limit=, eviction_policy=) and matching configure_cache() params appended after memory_max_entries/enable_litellm_cache; set_compression() helper added; magic-header (DSPC+codec byte) encode/decode wraps disk_cache get/put, legacy raw-pickle entries still load. Tests pass (tests/clients/test_cache.py 10/10). patch.txt written.
